title: marsdenia koi
intro: Marsdenia koi, also known as the Koi or Queen of the Night, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to India and Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Marsdenia koi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe muscle cramps and spasms. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in various herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
